name: Alvida
effect: If this Character would be K.O.'d, you may trash 1 Character card with a power of 6000 or less from your hand instead. [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may give 1 of your opponent's rested DON!! cards to 1 of your opponent's Characters: Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to its owner's Leader or 1 of their Characters.
